allow: Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\('App created OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\([r.rule for r in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\) if 'reports' in r.rule]\)")

Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app=create_app\(\); from app.models import Report, User; ctx=app.app_context\(\); ctx.push\(\); print\('users:', User.query.count\(\), '| reports:', Report.query.count\(\)\); ctx.pop\(\)")
Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app=create_app\(\); print\([r.rule for r in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\) if 'report' in r.rule.lower\(\)]\)")
